<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh-classical:九月十二]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840306]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 12|qq=September 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1271|1271]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]]） – [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was exiled to [[:en:Sado Island|Sado Island]]. * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1570|1570]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]]） – The 【本願寺 Kōsa】 of the Hongan-ji called on adherents in various provinces to rise up and attack [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], thus beginning the decade-long 【Ishiyama War】. * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]]） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] carried out the 【Mount Hiei Arson Incident】. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]） – Japan's first formal railway, running between 【Shinbashi】 and 【Yokohama】, was officially opened; service began the following day (【Railway Day】).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:645|645]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – {{ill|Kobun Daikō Ōkimi|ja|古人大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobun Daikō Ōkimi|1=Prince Furuhito-no-Ōe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410845}}, the first son of [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] (birth year unknown). * [[:en:Public security|Chian (era)]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1022|1022]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]） – {{ill|Tōshi Naishinnō|ja|当子内親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōshi Naishinnō|1=Tōshi-naishinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5354435}}, the first princess of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] (born [[:en:1001|1001]]). * {{ill|Ninji|ja|人治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 法治国家|1=Rechtsstaat|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4209223}} 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1242|1242]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Shuntoku Tennō]], the 84th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1197|1197]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1619|1619]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]） – [[:en:Fujiwara Seika|Fujiwara Sokaka]], a Confucian scholar (儒学者/儒生) (born [[:en:1561|1561]]). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1631|1631]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – [[:en:Katō Yoshiaki|Katō Yoshiaki]], lord of the [[:en:Iyo-Matsuyama Domain|Iyo Matsuyama Domain]] (born [[:en:1563|1563]]). * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1664|1664]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]]） – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nambu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the [[:en:Morioka Domain|Morioka Domain]] (born [[:en:1606|1606]]). * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]]） – [[:en:Matsudaira Masachika|Matsudaira Masachika]], lord of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (born [[:en:1640|1640]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1821|1821]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – [[:en:Hanawa Hokiichi|Hanawa Hokiichi]], a scholar of national literature (国文学者) (born [[:en:1746|1746]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|11|9|13|8|12|10|9|0912|qq=}}

revision.comment: Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh_classical:九月十二]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh_classical:九月十二]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh-classical:九月十二]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840306]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 12|qq=September 12}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1271|1271]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]]） – [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was exiled to [[:en:Sado Island|Sado Island]]. * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1570|1570]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]]） – The 【本願寺 Kōsa】 of the Hongan-ji called on adherents in various provinces to rise up and attack [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], thus beginning the decade-long 【Ishiyama War】. * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]]） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] carried out the 【Mount Hiei Arson Incident】. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]） – Japan's first formal railway, running between 【Shinbashi】 and 【Yokohama】, was officially opened; service began the following day (【Railway Day】).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:645|645]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – {{ill|Kobun Daikō Ōkimi|ja|古人大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobun Daikō Ōkimi|1=Prince Furuhito-no-Ōe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410845}}, the first son of [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] (birth year unknown). * [[:en:Public security|Chian (era)]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1022|1022]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]） – {{ill|Tōshi Naishinnō|ja|当子内親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōshi Naishinnō|1=Tōshi-naishinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5354435}}, the first princess of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] (born [[:en:1001|1001]]). * {{ill|Ninji|ja|人治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 法治国家|1=Rechtsstaat|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4209223}} 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1242|1242]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Shuntoku Tennō]], the 84th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1197|1197]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1619|1619]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]） – [[:en:Fujiwara Seika|Fujiwara Sokaka]], a Confucian scholar (儒学者/儒生) (born [[:en:1561|1561]]). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1631|1631]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – [[:en:Katō Yoshiaki|Katō Yoshiaki]], lord of the [[:en:Iyo-Matsuyama Domain|Iyo Matsuyama Domain]] (born [[:en:1563|1563]]). * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1664|1664]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]]） – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nambu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the [[:en:Morioka Domain|Morioka Domain]] (born [[:en:1606|1606]]). * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]]） – [[:en:Matsudaira Masachika|Matsudaira Masachika]], lord of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (born [[:en:1640|1640]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1821|1821]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – [[:en:Hanawa Hokiichi|Hanawa Hokiichi]], a scholar of national literature (国文学者) (born [[:en:1746|1746]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|11|9|13|8|12|10|9|0912|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]]） – [[:en:Matsudaira Masachika|Matsudaira Masachika]], lord of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (born [[:en:1640|1640]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1821|1821]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – [[:en:Hanawa Hokiichi|Hanawa Hokiichi]], a scholar of national literature (国文学者) (born [[:en:1746|1746]]).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh_classical:九月十二]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh_classical:九月十二]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh-classical:九月十二]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840306]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 12|qq=September 12}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1271|1271]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]]） – [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was exiled to [[:en:Sado Island|Sado Island]]. * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1570|1570]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]]） – The 【本願寺 Kōsa】 of the Hongan-ji called on adherents in various provinces to rise up and attack [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], thus beginning the decade-long 【Ishiyama War】. * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]]） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] carried out the 【Mount Hiei Arson Incident】. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]） – Japan's first formal railway, running between 【Shinbashi】 and 【Yokohama】, was officially opened; service began the following day (【Railway Day】).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:645|645]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – {{ill|Kobun Daikō Ōkimi|ja|古人大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobun Daikō Ōkimi|1=Prince Furuhito-no-Ōe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410845}}, the first son of [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] (birth year unknown). * [[:en:Public security|Chian (era)]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1022|1022]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]） – {{ill|Tōshi Naishinnō|ja|当子内親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōshi Naishinnō|1=Tōshi-naishinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5354435}}, the first princess of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] (born [[:en:1001|1001]]). * {{ill|Ninji|ja|人治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 法治国家|1=Rechtsstaat|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4209223}} 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1242|1242]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – [[:en:Emperor Juntoku|Shuntoku Tennō]], the 84th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:1197|1197]]). * [[:en:Yuanhe|Genna]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1619|1619]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]） – [[:en:Fujiwara Seika|Fujiwara Sokaka]], a Confucian scholar (儒学者/儒生) (born [[:en:1561|1561]]). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1631|1631]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – [[:en:Katō Yoshiaki|Katō Yoshiaki]], lord of the [[:en:Iyo-Matsuyama Domain|Iyo Matsuyama Domain]] (born [[:en:1563|1563]]). * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1664|1664]] [[:en:October 30|October 30]]） – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nambu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the [[:en:Morioka Domain|Morioka Domain]] (born [[:en:1606|1606]]). * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]]） – [[:en:Matsudaira Masachika|Matsudaira Masachika]], lord of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (born [[:en:1640|1640]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1821|1821]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – [[:en:Hanawa Hokiichi|Hanawa Hokiichi]], a scholar of national literature (国文学者) (born [[:en:1746|1746]]).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_yue" to "zh-yue"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh_classical:九月十二]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh_classical:九月十二]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh-classical:九月十二]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840306]] Wikidata name: 12th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 12|qq=September 12}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1271|1271]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]]） – [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was exiled to [[:en:Sado Island|Sado Island]]. * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1570|1570]] [[:en:October 11|October 11]]） – The 【本願寺 Kōsa】 of the Hongan-ji called on adherents in various provinces to rise up and attack [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]], thus beginning the decade-long 【Ishiyama War】. * [[:en:Genkō (1321–1324)|Genki]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1571|1571]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]]） – [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] carried out the 【Mount Hiei Arson Incident】. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1872|1872]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]]） – Japan's first formal railway, running between 【Shinbashi】 and 【Yokohama】, was officially opened; service began the following day (【Railway Day】).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:645|645]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – {{ill|Kobun Daikō Ōkimi|ja|古人大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobun Daikō Ōkimi|1=Prince Furuhito-no-Ōe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410845}}, the first son of [[:en:Emperor Jomei|Emperor Jomei]] (birth year unknown). * [[:en:Public security|Chian (era)]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1022|1022]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]） – {{ill|Tōshi Naishinnō|ja|当子内親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōshi Naishinnō|1=Tōshi-naishinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5354435}}, the first princess of [[:en:Emperor Sanjō|Emperor Sanjō]] (born 30|October 30]]） – [[:en:Nanbu Shigenao|Nambu Shigenao]], the 2nd lord of the [[:en:Morioka Domain|Morioka Domain]] (born [[:en:1606|1606]]). * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]]） – [[:en:Matsudaira Masachika|Matsudaira Masachika]], lord of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (born [[:en:1640|1640]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1821|1821]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]） – [[:en:Hanawa Hokiichi|Hanawa Hokiichi]], a scholar of national literature (国文学者) (born [[:en:1746|1746]]).

== Events == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1271|en|1271|WD=Q5523|lt=1271}} {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17}}） – {{ill|Nichiren|en|Nichiren|WD=Q311478|lt=Nichiren}} was exiled to {{ill|Sado Island|en|Sado Island|WD=Q998623|lt=Sado Island}}. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1570|en|1570|WD=Q6659|lt=1570}} {{ill|October 11|en|October 11|WD=Q2927|lt=October 11}}） – The 【本願寺 Kōsa】 of the Hongan-ji called on adherents in various provinces to rise up and attack {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}}, thus beginning the decade-long 【Ishiyama War】. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|WD=Q2881|lt=September 30}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} carried out the 【Mount Hiei Arson Incident】. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}}） – Japan's first formal railway, running between 【Shinbashi】 and 【Yokohama】, was officially opened; service began the following day (【Railway Day】).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|WD=Q1077930|lt=Taika}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645}} == Events == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1271|en|1271|WD=Q5523|lt=1271}} {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17}}） – {{ill|Nichiren|en|Nichiren|WD=Q311478|lt=Nichiren}} was exiled to {{ill|Sado Island|en|Sado Island|WD=Q998623|lt=Sado Island}}. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1570|en|1570|WD=Q6659|lt=1570}} {{ill|October 11|en|October 11|WD=Q2927|lt=October 11}}） – The 【本願寺 Kōsa】 of the Hongan-ji called on adherents in various provinces to rise up and attack {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}}, thus beginning the decade-long 【Ishiyama War】. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|WD=Q2881|lt=September 30}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} carried out the 【Mount Hiei Arson Incident】. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}}） – Japan's first formal railway, running between 【Shinbashi】 and 【Yokohama】, was officially opened; service began the following day (【Railway Day】).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1271|en|1271|WD=Q5523|lt=1271}} {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17}}） – {{ill|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|WD=Q311478en|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|WD=Q311478WD=Q311478|lt=Nichiren}} was exiled to {{ill|Sado Island|en|Sado Island|WD=Q998623|lt=Sado Island}}. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1570|en|1570|WD=Q6659|lt=1570}} {{ill|October 11|en|October 11|WD=Q2927|lt=October 11}}） – The 【本願寺 Kōsa】 of the Hongan-ji called on adherents in various provinces to rise up and attack {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}}, thus beginning the decade-long 【Ishiyama War】. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|WD=Q2881|lt=September 30}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} carried out the 【Mount Hiei Arson Incident】. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}}） – Japan's first formal railway, running between 【Shinbashi】 and 【Yokohama】, was officially opened; service began the following day (【Railway Day】).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|WD=Q1077930|lt=Taika}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645}} == Events == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1271|en|1271|WD=Q5523|lt=1271}} {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17}}） – {{ill|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|WD=Q311478en|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|WD=Q311478WD=Q311478|lt=Nichiren}} was exiled to {{ill|Sado Island|en|Sado Island|WD=Q998623|lt=Sado Island}}. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1570|en|1570|WD=Q6659|lt=1570}} {{ill|October 11|en|October 11|WD=Q2927|lt=October 11}}） – The 【本願寺 Kōsa】 of the Hongan-ji called on adherents in various provinces to rise up and attack {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}}, thus beginning the decade-long 【Ishiyama War】. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|WD=Q2881|lt=September 30}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} carried out the 【Mount Hiei Arson Incident】. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}}） – Japan's first formal railway, running between 【Shinbashi】 and 【Yokohama】, was officially opened; service began the following day (【Railway Day】).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh-classical:九月十二]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh-classical:九月十二]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 12일]][[zh-classical:九月十二]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十二]][[zh:九月十二]]
{{Not to be confused with|September 12|qq=September 12}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1271|en|1271|WD=Q5523|lt=1271|1=1271}} {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17|1=October 17}}） – {{ill|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|WD=Q311478en|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|WD=Q311478WD=Q311478|lt=Nichiren}} was exiled to {{ill|Sado Island|en|Sado Island|WD=Q998623|lt=Sado Island|1=Sado Island}}. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1570|en|1570|WD=Q6659|lt=1570|1=1570}} {{ill|October 11|en|October 11|WD=Q2927|lt=October 11|1=October 11}}） – The 【本願寺 Kōsa】 of the Hongan-ji called on adherents in various provinces to rise up and attack {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}}, thus beginning the decade-long 【Ishiyama War】. * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|WD=Q509889|lt=Genki|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1571|en|1571|WD=Q6666|lt=1571|1=1571}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|WD=Q2881|lt=September 30|1=September 30}}） – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} carried out the 【Mount Hiei Arson Incident】. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14|1=October 14}}） – Japan's first formal railway, running between 【Shinbashi】 and 【Yokohama】, was officially opened; service began the following day (【Railway Day】).
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|WD=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}}） – {{ill|Kobun Daikō Ōkimi|ja|古人大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kobun Daikō Ōkimi|1=Prince Furuhito-no-Ōe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11410845}}, the first son of {{ill|Emperor Jomei|en|Emperor Jomei|WD=Q329761|lt=Emperor Jomei|1=Emperor Jomei}} (birth year unknown). * {{ill|Public security|en|Public security|WD=Q294240|lt=Chian (era)|1=Public security}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1022|en|1022|WD=Q19261|lt=1022|1=1022}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|WD=Q2921|lt=October 10|1=October 10}}） – {{ill|Tōshi Naishinnō|ja|当子内親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōshi Naishinnō|1=Tōshi-naishinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5354435}}, the first princess of {{ill|Emperor Sanjō|en|Emperor Sanjō|WD=Q357231|lt=Emperor Sanjō|1=Emperor Sanjō}} (born {{ill|1001|en|1001|WD=Q19219|lt=1001|1=1001}}). * {{ill|Ninji|ja|人治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 法治国家|1=Rechtsstaat|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q4209223}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1242|en|1242|WD=Q5437|lt=1242|1=1242}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}}） – {{ill|Emperor Juntoku|en|Emperor Juntoku|WD=Q357249|lt=Shuntoku Tennō|1=Emperor Juntoku}}, the 84th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1197|en|1197|WD=Q19749|lt=1197|1=1197}}). * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|WD=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1619|en|1619|WD=Q6804|lt=1619|1=1619}} {{ill|October 19|en|October 19|WD=Q2961|lt=October 19|1=October 19}}） – {{ill|Fujiwara Seika|en|Fujiwara Seika|WD=Q655390|lt=Fujiwara Sokaka|1=Fujiwara Seika}}, a Confucian scholar (儒学者/儒生) (born {{ill|1561|en|1561|WD=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1631|en|1631|WD=Q6860|lt=1631|1=1631}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}}） – {{ill|Katō Yoshiaki|en|Katō Yoshiaki|WD=Q1371657|lt=Katō Yoshiaki|1=Katō Yoshiaki}}, lord of the {{ill|Iyo-Matsuyama Domain|en|Iyo-Matsuyama Domain|WD=Q1042087|lt=Iyo Matsuyama Domain|1=Iyo-Matsuyama Domain}} (born {{ill|1563|en|1563|WD=Q6629|lt=1563|1=1563}}). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1664|en|1664|WD=Q7581|lt=1664|1=1664}} {{ill|October 30|en|October 30|WD=Q2950|lt=October 30|1=October 30}}） – {{ill|Nanbu Shigenao|en|Nanbu Shigenao|WD=Q6962458|lt=Nambu Shigenao|1=Nanbu Shigenao}}, the 2nd lord of the {{ill|Morioka Domain|en|Morioka Domain|WD=Q908854|lt=Morioka Domain|1=Morioka Domain}} (born {{ill|1606|en|1606|WD=Q6747|lt=1606|1=1606}}). * {{ill|正德|en|正德|WD=Q11123425|lt=Shōtoku (era)|1=正德}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1711|en|1711|WD=Q6866|lt=1711|1=1711}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23|1=October 23}}） – {{ill|Matsudaira Masachika|en|Matsudaira Masachika|WD=Q6788037|lt=Matsudaira Masachika|1=Matsudaira Masachika}}, lord of the {{ill|Fukui Domain|en|Fukui Domain|WD=Q903537|lt=Fukui Domain|1=Fukui Domain}} (born {{ill|1640|en|1640|WD=Q6901|lt=1640|1=1640}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1821|en|1821|WD=Q6976|lt=1821|1=1821}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7|1=October 7}}） – {{ill|Hanawa Hokiichi|en|Hanawa Hokiichi|WD=Q6537362|lt=Hanawa Hokiichi|1=Hanawa Hokiichi}}, a scholar of national literature (国文学者) (born {{ill|1746|en|1746|WD=Q7589|lt=1746|1=1746}}).
